data.title: ED flags CoinDCX accounts as ₹285 Crore ($32m) crypto-fraud trail emerges
data.description:

The agency’s Hyderabad Zonal Office has attached ₹8. 46 crore held across 92 bank accounts, including financial balances connected to CoinDCX and a selection of crypto […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ed-flags-coindcx-accounts-%e2%82%b9285-crypto-fraud/
